prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS turbocharger kit (Garrett GT2860-5 core) paired with the J24B 2.4L DOHC 16V engine, utilizing a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and front-mount intercooler (GReddy Type-S) to support 22 psi of boost, targeting 320 whp and 280 lb-ft torque with a supporting fuel system upgrade (Walbro 450 LPH pump + ID1000x injectors).

Full bolt-on suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Kizashi-specific valving), complemented by Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear adjustable sway bars, polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension 9.5112G), and Whiteline rear subframe brace (KCA416) to eliminate chassis flex under hard cornering.

Engine management via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with custom dyno-tuned maps for the J24B, integrating a 3.5-bar MAP sensor, AEM X-Series wideband O2 (30-0334), and Kizashi-specific camshaft profiles (Toda Racing 264° intake/272° exhaust cams with 11.5mm lift) to optimize power delivery in the 4,500–7,500 RPM range.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (Pandem Design) with carbon fiber front splitter, overfenders (25mm wider front, 30mm wider rear), and ducktail spoiler, paired with custom 3M Gloss Black vinyl wrap and debadged grille for a stealth OEM+ look.

Enkei PF07 18x9.5 +35 wheels (gunmetal finish) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) with custom wheel spacers (5mm front, 10mm rear) to achieve flush fitment and aggressive stance.

Interior overhaul featuring Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Suzuki-specific mounting brackets), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay (Seibon) with relocated AEM digital dash (CD-7) and NRG quick-release steering wheel hub.
